Subject: Hi
Message:
Hi Andy,

How are things?  I am still in Houston looking for a
new home.  I hope that all is well with you.
Hopefully some certainty will happen with Newco in the
near future.  I wanted some help from you in finding a
job.  I know that you are very well respected in the
industry so if any opportunity that may fit me comes
your way could you please let me know.
